nodes.name: MQTT Trigger Stats
nodes.notes: Use the same MQTT credentials as your orchestrator workflow.

nodes.name: Insert Event Row
nodes.notes: Requires a Data Table named printer_events with columns: event_ts(date), day(string), printer_id(string), event_type(string), transition_from(string), transition_to(string), progress_pct(number), duration_sec(number), job_id(string), raw_payload(string).

nodes.name: Daily Cron
nodes.notes: Runs once per day and computes a daily snapshot from persisted event rows.

nodes.name: Fetch Today's Events
nodes.notes: Reads all event rows for the current day from the printer_events Data Table.

nodes.name: Upsert Daily Snapshot
nodes.notes: Requires a Data Table named printer_daily_stats with columns: snapshot_ts(date), day(string), printer_id(string), events(number), started(number), completed(number), failed(number), failure_rate(number), avg_duration_sec(number), total_duration_sec(number), active_jobs(number).

nodes.name: Daily Snapshot Ready
nodes.notes: The snapshot row is now stored in printer_daily_stats and can be charted directly from n8n Data Tables.
